report.summary: Cycle 13 standup: 1 agent run since v12 (build-v6 created Euler V2 Modular Lending ~2800w + Hyperlane Permissionless Interop ~2500w guides). 20 learn pages on disk (+2), all awaiting deploy. P0 blocker persists: no git repo initialized — 13th consecutive standup flagging deploy gap.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA FROM V12: 1 agent run completed — build-v6 (2 new learn guides: Euler V2 Modular Lending ~2800 words covering EVK/EVC architecture, $671M TVL, 297+ vaults, 31 security audits post-$197M hack, institutional pivot under CEO Jonathan Han + Hyperlane Permissionless Interoperability ~2500 words covering 150+ chains, Warp Routes $6B+ volume, ISM modular security, HYPER token TGE).

CONTENT PIPELINE: 20 learn guides now on disk (up from 18 at v12). Latest 2: Euler V2 Modular Lending Guide 2026 (intermediate, 8 sections, EVK architecture, vault types, Aave/Morpho/Compound comparison, 6 FAQs) + Hyperlane Permissionless Interoperability Guide 2026 (intermediate, 8 sections, Mailbox/ISM/Warp Routes, LayerZero/Wormhole/Axelar/CCIP comparison, 6 FAQs). Both with Article + FAQPage structured data.
SOCIAL PIPELINE: 299 tweets drafted all-time (unchanged from v12). Content calendar extends through May 17. No new community agent runs since v12.
PUBLISH STATUS: 628 published slugs (unchanged). 20 learn pages on disk awaiting deploy (up from 18). No git repo detected in workspace — all files are local only.

BUILD HEALTH: 20 page.tsx files in learn directory. No published-pages.ts found at expected path (may be in production repo only). Build-v6 claims files created but Euler V2 and Hyperlane directories not yet visible in /src/app/learn/ — possible cross-session write issue.
SEO NOTE: No GSC or Vercel Analytics available from sandbox. All 20 learn guides blocked on deploy. Both new guides include Article + FAQPage schema, OG metadata, and 5 internal cross-links each.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE STATUS: 13th standup of Apr 1. 38 total report-tracked agent cycles today: standup ×13, build ×6, publish ×4, design ×4, community ×2, eod ×9.

V12 PRIORITIES STATUS: (1) Commit & Deploy — NO CHANGE (P0 blocker, no git repo in workspace, 13th consecutive standup). (2) Batch-scaffold 109 missing page.tsx — NOT STARTED (carried all day). (3) Content calendar extension — UNCHANGED (extends to May 17, gap starts May 18).
COMPLETED SINCE V12: Build-v6 researched and created 2 guides (Euler V2 ~2800w + Hyperlane ~2500w). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE per build report. No other agent runs detected.

P0 BLOCKER (PERSISTENT ALL DAY — 13TH CYCLE): No git repository initialized in workspace mount. All 20 learn guides, OG images, tweets, UX fixes — everything exists only as local files. Production still running prior deployment. Requires human intervention to initialize repo, commit, and push.
P1 CARRY-OVER (UNCHANGED): 109 published slugs missing page.tsx (per previous reports). Not actionable until deploy pipeline established.

DISCREPANCY NOTE: Build-v6 report claims Euler V2 + Hyperlane page.tsx files created, but directories not visible in current learn/ listing (20 dirs, same as v12's 20 — the 2 new ones from v12 cycle already counted). Files may have been written to a different worktree or session.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — ESTABLISH GIT & DEPLOY (P0, CRITICAL, 13TH CONSECUTIVE CYCLE): No git repo in workspace. 20 learn guides (~16,000+ words total), OG images, 299 tweets, UX fixes, structured data — all stranded locally. Without version control, no deploy is possible. ESCALATION: Human must initialize git repo, connect remote, commit, and push. Every cycle without this is pure content accumulation with zero distribution.

PRIORITY 2 — VERIFY BUILD-V6 OUTPUT: Euler V2 + Hyperlane guides reported as created but not visible on disk in current session. Next build cycle should verify these files exist and are complete before creating new content. Content quality > quantity at this point.

PRIORITY 3 — CONTENT CALENDAR (MAY 18-24): Social calendar extends to May 17. Gap starts May 18. If community agent runs next cycle, extend through May 24. Topics: Euler V2 modular lending narrative, Hyperlane interop expansion, post-tax-deadline portfolio rebalancing.
